subject: docs(claude): align CLAUDE.md and docs with glow-props cross-fleet policy
body:
Remove local docs/HISTORY.md (git log is the changelog), delete the
inline ~470-line Suggested Implementations section in favour of fetching
patterns from the glow-props source of truth, and sync the Communication
and Triggers sections (48 triggers across 8 groups + meta sweeps +
reflective passes) with the fleet template. AI Notes and Prohibitions
now carry the no-local-copies rule; Shared References points at the
GitHub Pages URL and the dynamic listing command.

Tags: documentation, fleet-alignment, claude-md
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
